backend/main.mo: Motoko canister that stores per‑user high scores with authorization checks and provides queries for scores and a sorted leaderboard.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing implemented features, related files, components, tests, and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON mapping of frontend file paths to short functional descriptions for quick reference.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base and custom OKLCH theme variables defining the app’s light/dark color palette and global styles.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point that mounts the frontend and loads the main React bundle.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component rendering the GameScreen and global Toaster.
frontend/src/components/auth/LoginButton: Internet Identity login/logout button component with loading states and query cache clearing.
Canvas renderer that draws the Snake grid, snake segments, head effects, and food gradients based on game state.
frontend/src/components/game/GameControl: Touch control pad component for directional input with arrow buttons and mobile‑friendly layout.
frontend/src/components/game/GameHud.tsx: HUD showing score, game phase, and pause/resume/restart buttons.
frontend/src/components/game/Leaderboard: Leaderboard UI showing user’s best score and top players, with login prompt if unauthenticated.
frontend/src/game/types.ts: Type definitions and constants for Snake game state, directions, phases, and scoring.
frontend/src/game/useGame.ts: Implements the main Snake game logic including movement, collision, scoring, speed changes, and game loop control via React hooks.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and manages a backend actor based on the user’s Internet Identity and refreshes dependent queries when it changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity authentication context, loading saved identities, handling login/logout, and exposing status flags.
frontend/src/hooks/useScores.ts: Provides hooks to fetch caller scores, leaderboard data, and save new scores using the authenticated backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines Tailwind CSS setup and theme variables for light and dark modes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Bootstraps the React app with QueryClient and InternetIdentityProvider before rendering the root component.
frontend/src/pages/GameScreen.tsx: Implements the main game UI, handling menu navigation, gameplay rendering, authentication, and score saving on game over.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility helpers for reading, persisting, and clearing URL parameters using query strings, hash routing, and sessionStorage.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration that sets dark mode, content paths, extended theme colors, animations, and includes typography, container-queries, and animation plugins.
project_state.json: Defines the project’s current state, existing features, and pending requests related to creating a browser-based game with a visual theme and high-score system.
